Details: Implement missing headers to protect against clickjacking, MIME-sniffing, and downgrade attacks.
Recommended Action: Add the Strict-Transport-Security header with a max-age of at least 31536000 seconds, includeSubDomains, and preload directives to your web server configuration (e.g., Nginx: `add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload" always;`).
